channel.title: Self-Hosted on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Self-Hosted on Arrans github.io

item.title: n8n-io/n8n
item.description: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

item.title: mealie-recipes/mealie
item.description: Mealie is a self hosted recipe manager and meal planner with a RestAPI backend and a reactive frontend application built in Vue for a pleasant user experience for the whole family. Easily add recipes into your database by providing the url and mealie will automatically import the relevant data or add a family recipe with the UI editor

item.title: ArchiveBox/ArchiveBox
item.description: 🗃 Open source self-hosted web archiving. Takes URLs/browser history/bookmarks/Pocket/Pinboard/etc., saves HTML, JS, PDFs, media, and more…

item.title: getmaxun/maxun
item.description: ⚡️ Open Source No Code Web Data Extraction Platform • Turn Websites To APIs & Spreadsheets In Minutes ⚡️

item.title: Kareadita/Kavita
item.description: Kavita is a fast, feature rich, cross platform reading server. Built with the goal of being a full solution for all your reading needs. Setup your own server and share your reading collection with your friends and family.

item.title: advplyr/audiobookshelf
item.description: Self-hosted audiobook and podcast server

item.title: iib0011/omni-tools
item.description: Self-hosted collection of powerful web-based tools for everyday tasks. No ads, no tracking, just fast, accessible utilities right from your browser!

item.title: menloresearch/jan
item.description: Jan is an open source alternative to ChatGPT that runs 100% offline on your computer

item.title: knadh/listmonk
item.description: High performance, self-hosted, newsletter and mailing list manager with a modern dashboard. Single binary app.

item.title: automatisch/automatisch
item.description: The open source Zapier alternative. Build workflow automation without spending time and money.

item.title: karakeep-app/karakeep
item.description: A self-hostable bookmark-everything app (links, notes and images) with AI-based automatic tagging and full text search

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted
item.description: A list of Free Software network services and web applications which can be hosted on your own servers

item.title: usememos/memos
item.description: A modern, open-source, self-hosted knowledge management and note-taking platform designed for privacy-conscious users and organizations.

item.title: louislam/uptime-kuma
item.description: A fancy self-hosted monitoring tool

item.title: Freika/dawarich
item.description: Self-hostable alternative to Google Location History (Google Maps Timeline)

item.title: open-webui/open-webui
item.description: User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, …)

item.title: immich-app/immich
item.description: High performance self-hosted photo and video management solution.

item.title: henrygd/beszel
item.description: Lightweight server monitoring hub with historical data, docker stats, and alerts.

item.title: appwrite/appwrite
item.description: Build like a team of hundreds_

item.title: dgtlmoon/changedetection.io
item.description: The best and simplest free open source web page change detection, website watcher, restock monitor and notification service. Restock Monitor, change detection. Designed for simplicity - Simply monitor which websites had a text change for free. Free Open source web page change detection, Website defacement monitoring, Price change notification

item.title: go-vikunja/vikunja
item.description: The to-do app to organize your life.

item.title: photoprism/photoprism
item.description: AI-Powered Photos App for the Decentralized Web 🌈💎✨

item.title: n8n-io/self-hosted-ai-starter-kit
item.description: The Self-hosted AI Starter Kit is an open-source template that quickly sets up a local AI environment. Curated by n8n, it provides essential tools for creating secure, self-hosted AI workflows.

item.title: alexta69/metube
item.description: Self-hosted YouTube downloader (web UI for youtube-dl / yt-dlp)

item.title: solidtime-io/solidtime
item.description: Modern open-source time-tracking app

item.title: pawelmalak/flame
item.description: Flame is self-hosted startpage for your server. Easily manage your apps and bookmarks with built-in editors.

item.title: rommapp/romm
item.description: A beautiful, powerful, self-hosted rom manager and player.

item.title: siyuan-note/siyuan
item.description: A privacy-first, self-hosted, fully open source personal knowledge management software, written in typescript and golang.

item.title: anderspitman/awesome-tunneling
item.description: List of ngrok/Cloudflare Tunnel alternatives and other tunneling software and services. Focus on self-hosting.

item.title: khoj-ai/khoj
item.description: Your AI second brain. Self-hostable. Get answers from the web or your docs. Build custom agents, schedule automations, do deep research. Turn any online or local LLM into your personal, autonomous AI (gpt, claude, gemini, llama, qwen, mistral). Get started - free.

item.title: awesome-foss/awesome-sysadmin
item.description: A curated list of amazingly awesome open-source sysadmin resources.

item.title: marcopiovanello/yt-dlp-web-ui
item.description: A terrible web ui and RPC server for yt-dlp. Designed to be self-hosted.

item.title: m1k1o/neko
item.description: A self hosted virtual browser that runs in docker and uses WebRTC.

item.title: akhilrex/podgrab
item.description: A self-hosted podcast manager/downloader/archiver tool to download podcast episodes as soon as they become live with an integrated player.

item.title: wallabag/wallabag
item.description: wallabag is a self hostable application for saving web pages: Save and classify articles. Read them later. Freely.

item.title: linkwarden/linkwarden
item.description: ⚡️⚡️⚡️ Self-hosted collaborative bookmark manager to collect, organize, and preserve webpages, articles, and documents.

item.title: Forceu/Gokapi
item.description: Lightweight selfhosted Firefox Send alternative without public upload. AWS S3 supported.

item.title: dittofeed/dittofeed
item.description: Open-source customer engagement. Automate transactional and marketing messages across email, SMS, mobile push, WhatsApp, Slack, and more 📨

item.title: gogs/gogs
item.description: Gogs is a painless self-hosted Git service

item.title: gotify/server
item.description: A simple server for sending and receiving messages in real-time per WebSocket. (Includes a sleek web-ui)

item.title: LumePart/Explo
item.description: Spotify’s “Discover Weekly” for self-hosted music systems

item.title: owncast/owncast
item.description: Take control over your live stream video by running it yourself. Streaming + chat out of the box.

item.title: getmango/Mango
item.description: Mango is a self-hosted manga server and web reader

item.title: blinkospace/blinko
item.description: An open-source, self-hosted personal AI note tool prioritizing privacy, built using TypeScript .

item.title: Bubka/2FAuth
item.description: A Web app to manage your Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) accounts and generate their security codes

item.title: suitenumerique/docs
item.description: A collaborative note taking, wiki and documentation platform that scales. Built with Django and React. Opensource alternative to Notion or Outline.

item.title: mrmn2/PdfDing
item.description: Selfhosted PDF manager, viewer and editor offering a seamless user experience on multiple devices.

item.title: owlistic-notes/owlistic
item.description: 🦉 Free open-source notetaking app with real-time sync 🔄⚡️🚀

item.title: claabs/epicgames-freegames-node
item.description: Automatically login and find available free games the Epic Games Store. Sends you a prepopulated checkout link so you can complete the checkout after logging in. Supports multiple accounts, login sessions, and scheduled runs.

item.title: Volmarg/personal-management-system
item.description: Your web application for managing personal data. personal.management.system.inbox@gmail.com

item.title: neonwatty/meme-search
item.description: The open source Meme Search Engine and Finder. Free and built to self-host locally with Python, Ruby, and Docker.

item.title: ofkm/arcane
item.description: Modern Docker Management, Designed for Everyone

item.title: seanmorley15/AdventureLog
item.description: Self-hostable travel tracker and trip planner.

item.title: muety/anchr
item.description: ⚓️ Anchr provides you with a toolbox for tiny tasks on the internet, especially bookmark collections

item.title: logdyhq/logdy-core
item.description: Realtime log viewer with web UI, tail -f for logs with a web interface browser.

item.title: sandstorm-io/sandstorm
item.description: Sandstorm is a self-hostable web productivity suite. It’s implemented as a security-hardened web app package manager.

item.title: getlago/lago
item.description: Open Source Metering and Usage Based Billing API ⭐️ Consumption tracking, Subscription management, Pricing iterations, Payment orchestration & Revenue analytics

item.title: traderepublic/Cilicon
item.description: 🛠️ Self-Hosted ephemeral macOS CI on Apple Silicon

item.title: getumbrel/llama-gpt
item.description: A self-hosted, offline, ChatGPT-like chatbot. Powered by Llama 2. 100% private, with no data leaving your device. New: Code Llama support!

item.title: FoxxMD/multi-scrobbler
item.description: Scrobble plays from multiple sources to multiple clients

item.title: github-aws-runners/terraform-aws-github-runner
item.description: Terraform module for scalable GitHub action runners on AWS

item.title: cachethq/cachet
item.description: 🚦 Cachet, the open-source, self-hosted status page system.

item.title: timelinize/timelinize
item.description: Store your data from all your accounts and devices in a single cohesive timeline on your own computer

item.title: AlexGustafsson/cupdate
item.description: A service to keep container images secure and up-to-date. Made for Kubernetes and Docker.

item.title: givanz/Vvveb
item.description: Powerful and easy to use cms to build websites, blogs or ecommerce stores.

item.title: fossar/selfoss
item.description: multipurpose rss reader, live stream, mashup, aggregation web application

item.title: vinceanalytics/vince
item.description: Self Hosted Alternative To Google Analytics

item.title: corenting/eddrit
item.description: A lightweight alternative frontend for Reddit.

item.title: nicoan/kindly-rss-reader
item.description: RSS Aggregator optimized for e-ink devices

item.title: jaypyles/anirra
item.description: Anirra is a completely self-hosted anime watchlist, search, and recommendations app. It allows anime enthusiasts to manage their watchlists, discover new anime, and receive personalized recommendations, all from a single platform.

item.title: Tanq16/backhub
item.description: Backhub helps maintain backups of multiple GitHub repos as full local mirrors.

item.title: nbr23/youtube-dl-server
item.description: Web / REST interface for downloading youtube videos onto a server.

item.title: rstemmer/musicdb
item.description: 🎧 A music manager with focus on remote access to your music by having a WebUI and providing an audio stream.

item.title: fingerthief/minimal-chat
item.description: MinimalChat is a lightweight, open-source chat application that allows you to interact with various large language models.
